title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
